GM & PM Console Commands

Eudemons Online GM, PM and Server console commands reference. Supports both Classic and New engines.

PM Command

Note: Player names for PM characters must include the [PM] tag (e.g., DuaSelipar[PM]) to use these commands.

GM Command

Note: Player names for GM characters must include the [GM] tag (e.g., DuaSelipar[GM]) to use these commands.

MSG Command (insert command without "/")

Note: These commands are executed directly in the server MSG console window (not in the in-game chat) and are only for New Engine (1655).
